name: HyperDoll
description: Super stickman battle is waiting for you with HyperDoll. You have to destroy the enemies with the superhero who can use the sword. In this game that can be played with one finger, you control the stickman character and try to destroy the enemies by hitting them. Do you want to experience the exciting stickman battle with HyperDoll?
instructions: PC Give direction by scrolling with the mouse Mobile Give direction by sliding with the finger
tags: Best, Fight, Hot, Kids, Kill, Mobile, Platform, Stickman
